conversations.say: Rafi, I agree to your terms regarding customer privacy. Let's examine the transaction patterns near the printing floor without compromising names.

public_statement: An investigation must acknowledge when a segment is manufactured. I am comparing the witness accounts to keep our timeline grounded in observable fact.

commitments.promise: Not to disclose customer names or treat ordinary transactions as proof of R's identity without agreed attribution terms.
I will not share Samira's intimate history or personal disclosures without prior consent.
I will abide by Inez's fair-treatment terms and protect witness risk before publishing any neighborhood accounts.

Engaged Dee Nowak regarding service route and camera audit context under anonymity terms.
Continued timeline comparison with Samira Vale while upholding discretion commitments.
reasoning_summary: In Section 2, Morgan Shaw formalizes agreements with Rafi and Dee to secure local context without violating trust, while continuing to weigh the manufactured route segment against voluntary witness accounts.
